subject: Re:
body:
what do you need? no problem

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, May 30, 2007 8:12:12 AM
Subject: 


May I ask a HUGE HUGE favor?  My rent is due and I do not have all of it.

I need reassess my finances and I am thinking I should look for a cheaper 
apartment although they only get crappier, smaller and scarier neighborhoods 
for anything less than what I currently pay but worth looking.  I have such 
few expenses, as you know I never shop, nor travel and still I have a tough 
time making ends meet.  Drives me crazy!  I will put a spreadsheet together 
and perhaps one day you can look it over and give me some advice.  I'd 
really appreciate the guidance!

THANK YOU!!

_________________________________________________________________
